episodes.title: Pip's Gentle Hello
episodes.lesson: You are wonderfully made and deeply loved.

episodes.title: Fern's Garden Share
episodes.lesson: Sharing joy makes friendship grow.

episodes.title: Moss and the Kindness Trail
episodes.lesson: Small acts of kindness light the path for everyone.

episodes.title: Reed's Wisdom Perch
episodes.lesson: Wisdom listens before it speaks.

episodes.title: Sage at the Crossroads
episodes.lesson: Choose integrity even when it is hard.

episodes.title: Laurel's Morning Song
episodes.lesson: Gratitude turns ordinary mornings into gifts.

episodes.title: Pip and the Soft Breeze
episodes.lesson: God's gentle touch is everywhere you feel safe.

episodes.title: Pip's Moonlight Snuggle
episodes.lesson: You are held in love even when the day grows quiet.

episodes.title: Pip's Twinkle Toes
episodes.lesson: Your body is a gift to move with joy.

episodes.title: Pip's Rainbow Wave
episodes.lesson: After rain comes color and hope.

episodes.title: Pip's Heartbeat Lullaby
episodes.lesson: You are loved with a steady, never-ending heart.

episodes.title: Fern's Flower Surprise
episodes.lesson: Small surprises can brighten someone's whole day.

episodes.title: Fern's Patience Pots
episodes.lesson: Good things grow when we wait with hope.

episodes.title: Fern's Butterfly Visit
episodes.lesson: Be gentle with delicate things and people.

episodes.title: Fern's Weeding Teamwork
episodes.lesson: Working together makes hard jobs feel lighter.

episodes.title: Fern's Seed Gift
episodes.lesson: Giving something you love can grow more love.

episodes.title: Moss the Bridge Builders
episodes.lesson: Building bridges connects hearts across differences.

episodes.title: Moss Lost and Found
episodes.lesson: Helping someone find what matters shows real friendship.

episodes.title: Moss's Campfire Stories
episodes.lesson: Stories connect us to wisdom passed down with love.

episodes.title: Moss and the Apology Path
episodes.lesson: Saying sorry and forgiving mends what was broken.

episodes.title: Moss's Team Harvest
episodes.lesson: Sharing the harvest blesses everyone at the table.

episodes.title: Reed and the Rumor Mist
episodes.lesson: Check facts before words spread like fog.

episodes.title: Reed's Patience Listeners
episodes.lesson: Listening fully is a gift that helps others feel seen.

episodes.title: Reed's Honest Feather
episodes.lesson: Honesty weighs lightly; lies grow heavy over time.

episodes.title: Reed's Storm Shelter
episodes.lesson: Storms pass faster when friends shelter together.

episodes.title: Reed's Mentor Circle
episodes.lesson: Learning from elders and teaching younger ones completes the circle.

episodes.title: Sage and Truth Telling
episodes.lesson: Speaking truth with courage protects everyone you love.

episodes.title: Sage and Peer Pressure
episodes.lesson: You can say no and still belong.

episodes.title: Sage's Forgiveness Trail
episodes.lesson: Forgiveness frees you from carrying old hurt.

episodes.title: Sage's Service Saturday
episodes.lesson: Serving others turns faith into visible love.

episodes.title: Sage's Steady Anchor
episodes.lesson: When life shifts, your values keep you steady.

episodes.title: Laurel's Evening Rest
episodes.lesson: Rest is sacred work that restores body and soul.

episodes.title: Laurel's Caregiver Breath
episodes.lesson: Caregivers need breath breaks to sustain compassionate care.

episodes.title: Laurel's Gratitude Journal
episodes.lesson: Naming blessings daily reshapes how you see hard seasons.

episodes.title: Laurel's Community Table
episodes.lesson: A shared table turns strangers into family.

episodes.title: Laurel's Legacy Roots
episodes.lesson: What you plant in others outlives any single season.

episodes.title: Wren's Lullaby Nest
episodes.lesson: God's love shelters us like a warm nest.
beats: Hello, little one. Wren built a soft nest today.
I'm Wren the chick. Cheep, cheep!
Elder Oak rustles a gentle lullaby.
Your grown-up can rock you side to side.
God keeps you safe in His caring arms.
Snuggle close. Rest is a gift.

episodes.title: Dot's Twinkle Pause
episodes.lesson: Small beauties remind us God sees every detail.
beats: Look! A tiny dot of light on a leaf.
I'm Dot the ladybug. Twinkle, twinkle!
Pause with Elder Oak and breathe slowly.
Tap when you see something small and lovely.
Every little wonder is on purpose.

episodes.title: Pebble's Slow River
episodes.lesson: Patience is a gift we can practice together.
beats: The river moves slow and steady.
I'm Pebble the turtle. One step at a time.
Elder Oak says hurry is not always help.
Your grown-up can count to three with you.
Waiting can be peaceful, not scary.

episodes.title: Lumi's Gentle Glow
episodes.lesson: Even a small light pushes back the dark.
beats: When the meadow grows dim, a glow appears.
I'm Lumi the firefly. I shine gently.
Elder Oak says light and love never run out.
Jesus is the light that never leaves us.

episodes.title: Coco's Splash Joy
episodes.lesson: Simple joys are gifts to thank God for.
beats: Splash! Coco found a puddle to play in.
I'm Coco the duckling. Quack with joy!
Elder Oak laughs with the rain.
Splash your hands gently with your grown-up.
Thank You, God, for water and giggles.
Joy bubbles up when we share.

episodes.title: Nuzzle's Soft Hum
episodes.lesson: Gentle rhythms remind us God holds us close.
beats: Shhh. Nuzzle found a quiet corner.
I'm Nuzzle the lamb. Hum with me.
Elder Oak sways a slow lullaby.
Your grown-up can hum a soft tune.
God's love is steady like a heartbeat.
Rest your eyes. You are safe.

episodes.title: Maple's Acorn Share
episodes.lesson: Giving something away can grow friendship.
beats: Maple found shiny acorns under Elder Oak.
I'm Maple the squirrel. Want one?
Sharing means both friends can smile.
One for you, one for me. Thank you!
Elder Oak says generous hearts grow tall.

episodes.title: Sunny's Pollen Parade
episodes.lesson: We each have work that helps the whole garden.
beats: Buzz! Sunny leads a pollen parade.
I'm Sunny the bee. Follow the happy hum!
Every job in God's garden matters.
March your feet to the beat.
Elder Oak waves from the hive tree.

episodes.title: Petal's Color Dance
episodes.lesson: God made colors to celebrate life.
beats: I'm Petal the butterfly. Dance with me!
Red, yellow, blue  all on purpose.
Spin when you hear your favorite color.
Elder Oak loves every hue you are.

episodes.title: Brook's Splash Share
episodes.lesson: Kindness at the stream ripples outward.
beats: Brook splashes cool water for friends.
I'm Brook the otter. Splash and share!
Offer a turn. There is room for you.
Elder Oak says gentle hands matter.

episodes.title: Hazel's Hide and Seek
episodes.lesson: Being found means you are loved.
beats: One, two, three  hide with Hazel!
Your grown-up can seek you gently.
Found you! Hugs are always okay.
God sees you even when you hide.
Elder Oak giggles in the leaves.

episodes.title: Sprout's Rain Boots
episodes.lesson: Joyful play in hard weather builds resilience.
beats: Rain drops! Sprout pulls on bright boots.
I'm Sprout the frog. Splish, splash!
Puddles are for jumping, not hiding.
Elder Oak laughs under the rain hat.
You turned a gray day bright.

episodes.title: River's Dam Teamwork
episodes.lesson: Working together honors how God made community.
beats: River is building a dam with friends.
I'm River the beaver. Teamwork time!
Tap HELP when someone needs you.
Elder Oak says serve one another.

episodes.title: Sky's Truth Treetop
episodes.lesson: Truth spoken kindly builds trust.
beats: Sky perches high to see the whole meadow.
I'm Sky the blue jay. Honest words help.
Tell the truth with a gentle heart.

episodes.title: Clover's Meadow Invite
episodes.lesson: Including others reflects God's welcome.
beats: Clover spots a friend alone on the edge.
I'm Clover the deer. Come play with us!
There is always room for one more.

episodes.title: Flint's Night Courage
episodes.lesson: Courage means trying even when we feel unsure.
beats: The trail grows dark. Flint stays calm.
I'm Flint the owl. Breathe with me.
Fear is real. You can still be brave.
Hold your grown-up's hand if you want.
God is with you in the dark and light.

episodes.title: Briar's Bridge Help
episodes.lesson: Helping across a gap is love in action.
beats: A stream blocks the path. Briar has a plan.
I'm Briar the rabbit. Let's build a bridge.
HELP can be a bridge for someone.

episodes.title: Thistle's Trail Markers
episodes.lesson: Leaving kind markers helps others find their way.
beats: Thistle marks a winding forest trail.
I'm Thistle the fox. Follow the kind signs.
Small markers can guide big journeys.
Tap MARK when you spot a trail sign.
Elder Oak says help others find the path.

episodes.title: Ash's Honest Echo
episodes.lesson: What we repeat online should be true and kind.
beats: Ash hears an echo that isn't quite true.
I'm Ash the raccoon. Let's check the facts.
Words bounce farther than we think.
Pause before you pass a story along.
Elder Oak says wisdom listens first.

episodes.title: Pike's Listen Lake
episodes.lesson: Listening well is a superpower.
beats: Pike stands still at the quiet lake.
I'm Pike the heron. Listen with me.

episodes.title: Juniper's Trail Choice
episodes.lesson: Choices show who we are becoming.
beats: I'm Juniper the fox. Choose with care.
The kind path is not always easy.
You can say no without being cruel.
Elder Oak trusts your growing heart.

episodes.title: Ridge's Team Patience
episodes.lesson: Teams win when patience meets practice.
beats: Ridge coaches friends through a tough game.
I'm Ridge the hawk. We learn together.
Cheer for tries, not only wins.
Elder Oak says growth takes seasons.

episodes.title: Willow's Wind Apology
episodes.lesson: A real apology heals friendships.
beats: Wind rattles branches. Feelings got hurt.
I'm Willow the deer. Let's repair this.
I'm sorry. I hear you. How can I help?
Forgiveness is a journey, not a race.
Elder Oak makes space for both voices.

episodes.title: Lane's Crosswalk Care
episodes.lesson: Looking out for others is leadership in action.
beats: Lane waits at a busy crosswalk.
I'm Lane the deer. We go together.
Notice who needs an extra pause.
Offer your arm. Slow is okay.
Elder Oak says care slows us down on purpose.

episodes.title: Atlas's Road Integrity
episodes.lesson: Integrity means matching actions to values.
beats: Atlas faces a shortcut that isn't fair.
I'm Atlas the wolf. Walk the right road.
Character shows when no one is watching.
You can stand alone and still be kind.
Elder Oak walked hard paths too.
Integrity is courage in quiet moments.

episodes.title: Nova's Signal Truth
episodes.lesson: Truth protects people we care about.
beats: I'm Nova the raven. Signal truth clearly.
Speak up with facts and compassion.
Silence can hurt when truth is needed.
Elder Oak says love and truth belong together.

episodes.title: Ember's Stand Kind
episodes.lesson: Standing up can still be gentle.
beats: Someone is left out at the crossroads.
I'm Ember the fox. Stand with them.
Elder Oak opens the circle wider.

episodes.title: Harbor's Anchor Peace
episodes.lesson: Peace is a practice we can choose daily.
beats: I'm Harbor the seal. Anchor in calm.
Breathe in hope. Breathe out fear.
God's peace guards hearts and minds.
You found calm in the chaos.

episodes.title: Summit's Service Path
episodes.lesson: Service turns gratitude into action.
beats: Summit sees a need on the high path.
I'm Summit the eagle. Serve with joy.
Elder Oak served the meadow for years.

episodes.title: Cipher's Digital Pause
episodes.lesson: Pausing before posting protects people and peace.
beats: Cipher sees a heated thread growing fast.
I'm Cipher the owl. Pause before you post.
Words online travel farther than we think.
Elder Oak says wisdom waits one beat.
Log off with grace, pause friend.

episodes.title: Dawn's Gratitude Table
episodes.lesson: Gratitude turns ordinary mornings into gifts.
beats: Dawn sets a simple table at sunrise.
I'm Dawn the songbird. Name three mercies.
Even hard days hold small gifts.
Your voice, however you speak, matters.

episodes.title: Cedar's Legacy Give
episodes.lesson: What we give outlives what we keep.
beats: Cedar tends seedlings for the next generation.
I'm Cedar the stag. Plant for tomorrow.

episodes.title: Meadow's Mercy Return
episodes.lesson: Mercy restores what shame tries to steal.
beats: A friend returns after a hard season.
I'm Meadow the sheep. Welcome them home.
Forgiveness is freedom for both sides.
I'm glad you're here. Let's begin again.
Elder Oak kept a place at the table.

episodes.title: Harbor's Hope Ripple
episodes.lesson: Hope shared becomes hope multiplied.
beats: Harbor sends encouragement across the water.
I'm Harbor the dolphin. Ripple hope outward.
One kind message can change a week.
Text, call, or pray for someone.
God uses ordinary hands as lifelines.

episodes.title: Stone's Steadfast Prayer
episodes.lesson: Steadfast prayer anchors busy lives.
beats: Stone stands still while the world rushes.
I'm Stone the crane. Pause and pray.
Bring worries to God in honest words.
Rest is not laziness. It is trust.
Elder Oak has prayed through every season.

episodes.title: Root's Deep Gratitude
episodes.lesson: Gratitude rooted deep sustains us through every season.
beats: Root kneels by old roots at dusk.
I'm Root the badger. Name what held you today.
Gratitude is not denial. It is strength.
Elder Oak remembers every planter's hands.
